name: medical-microservices
description: Online medical appointment backend — run all services with one command from repo root

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n US,DS,AS,PS,GW -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green,blue "npm start --prefix user-service" "npm start --prefix doctor-service" "npm start --prefix appointment-service" "npm start --prefix payment-service" "npm start --prefix api-gateway"
scripts.start:services-only: concurrently -n US,DS,AS,PS -c cyan,magenta,yellow,green "npm start --prefix user-service" "npm start --prefix doctor-service" "npm start --prefix appointment-service" "npm start --prefix payment-service"
